summary: Strategic analytics leader with extensive experience owning the full data science lifecycle, transforming ambiguous business challenges into actionable insights and strategic recommendations for senior leadership. Expert in architecting scalable data solutions and deploying advanced analytical and causal models, with a proven track record of driving significant impact in policy, risk, and compliance domains through data pipelining, BI, and sophisticated analysis.

highlights: Engineered a readiness platform for 17K+ global assets; leveraged SQL-based methodology and interactive visualization to conduct spatiotemporal root-cause analysis on downtime trends, resulting in an accelerated, proactive diagnostic framework that reduced time to discovery by over 10 days.

Developed a scalable Python automation framework to modernize complex inventory audit workflows; eliminated manual data disparities and reduced reporting latency by 80%, ensuring the high-fidelity data integrity required to secure consecutive unmodified audit opinions for the USMC.

Modernized enterprise-scale financial forecasting by architecting automated Databricks ETL pipelines; consolidated disparate, legacy transactional streams into a unified Data Lakehouse, achieving a 12% increase in forecasting accuracy through the deployment of advanced time-series ensemble models.

Spearheaded data architecture for a Coast Guard Data Warehouse and automated Python/SQL ETL pipelines to unify disparate silos into a single source of truth; engineered predictive maintenance models and self-service BI suites that transitioned leadership from reactive reporting to proactive, data-driven asset management.

Directed an enterprise-wide Business Intelligence suite for 500+ stakeholders, centralizing disparate financial streams into a unified Power BI ecosystem; automated 60% of manual reporting tasks, reducing report generation time from hours to seconds and accelerating the fiscal decision-making cycle.
Constructed a complex model to forecast cost for modernization of 50 stovepiped Navy IT systems, and optimize the development schedule of new capabilities and shutdown of legacy systems.

skills.label: Data Science & Advanced Analytics
skills.details: Statistical Analysis, Machine Learning, Predictive Modeling, Causal Inference, Operations Research, R, Generative AI

skills.label: Data Engineering & Platforms
skills.details: SQL, Python, ETL, Spark, BigQuery, Azure, Databricks, Data Engineering
